zh.Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton於1310年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Molyneux25歲，母親Agatha de Kyrton23歲。他於大約1329年與Joan Elall在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1367年登記服兵役。他去世於1372年享年62歲。

zh-hans.Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton于1310年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Molyneux25岁，母亲Agatha de Kyrton23岁。他于大约1329年与Joan Elall在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1367年登记服兵役。他去世于1372年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton was born in 1310, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Richard Molyneux, was 25 and his mother, Agatha de Kyrton, was 23. He married Joan Elall about 1329, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1367. He died in 1372, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton est né en 1310, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Molyneux, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Kyrton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Elall environ 1329, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1367. Il est décédé en 1372, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton 1310 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Molyneux 25 und seine Mutter Agatha de Kyrton 23. Er hat um 1329 in Lancashire, England Joan Elall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1367 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1372 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton è nato il nel 1310 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Molyneux, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agatha de Kyrton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Elall circa 1329, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1367. Morì nel 1372, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Molyneux I, Lord Of Seftonが1310年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Molyneuxは25歳，母Agatha de Kyrtonは23歳であった。約1329年にイギリスランカシュアイアでJoan Elallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年に兵役登録をした。彼は1372年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton(이)가 1310년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Molyneux(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agatha de Kyrton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1329년 영국 랭카실르에서 Joan Elall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1372년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton nasceu em 1310, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Molyneux, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Kyrton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Elall aproximadamente 1329, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1367. Ele faleceu em 1372, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton родился в 1310 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Molyneux было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Kyrton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Elall около 1329 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1367 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1372 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton nació en 1310, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Molyneux, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agatha de Kyrton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Elall aproximadamente 1329, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1367. Murió en 1372, a la edad de 62 años.
